overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city intersection, starting on a sidewalk and moving into a crosswalk to observe passing traffic. The scene features tall buildings with neon billboards, futuristic vehicles, and a mix of natural overcast and artificial neon lighting typical of a high-end video game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with pedestrian signal infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past a red pedestrian signal box, approaching a large intersection

entered.detail: red rectangular pedestrian crossing signal with yellow walk symbol
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street with glass and steel construction
tall building with green-tinted glass facade
dark building with large vertical purple and white digital billboards
row of young trees planted along the sidewalk edge
thick metal pole with traffic control equipment

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a concrete sidewalk in a dense cyberpunk urban environment. The camera passes a prominent red pedestrian signal box while tall buildings with neon billboards and an overhead pedestrian bridge dominate the skyline. Sparse vegetation lines the left side of the walkway as the camera approaches a major intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with marked crosswalk

events.description: moves from concrete sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk, entering the intersection
white futuristic sports car drives through the intersection followed by other vehicles
blue sports car speeds through the crosswalk area from left to right

agents.ego_description: turning right to face cross traffic and walking through the crosswalk while observing futuristic vehicles passing through the intersection

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving through the intersection from right to left
blue sports car speeding past the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
tall building with holographic signage and curved architectural elements
red signal light suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the sidewalk into a wide urban intersection, turning to face cross traffic. Yellow crosswalk stripes cover the ground as various futuristic vehicles—including a white sports car and a blue coupe—drive through the intersection. The neon billboard building and overhead bridge now appear on the left side of the frame as the camera navigates the crosswalk area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow urban sidewalk into the open expanse of a bustling cyberpunk intersection. It begins by gliding along a concrete walkway past a red pedestrian signal box, with tall buildings and neon billboards looming overhead alongside a pedestrian bridge. As the camera approaches the corner, the path opens up and shifts from the sidewalk into a wide crosswalk marked by bold yellow stripes. The perspective then turns toward the flow of traffic, where futuristic white and blue vehicles stream past while the neon-lit skyline and bridge transition to the left side of the frame.
